title: Portfolios of Deputy Governors
description: Consequent on the appointment and assumption of charge by Shri Rohit Jain as Deputy Governor, the distribution of portfolios among the Deputy Governors with effect from May 4, 2026 will be the following: Name Departments Shri Swaminathan Janakiraman* 1. Central Security Cell 2. Consumer Education and Protection Department 3. Department of Supervision 4. Deposit Insurance and Credit Guarantee Corporation 5. Financial Inclusion and Development Department 6. Human Resource Management Department 7.
